panels.title: System Health

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, health_score AS "Health" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Summarizes the current health of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: Temp

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, temp_avg AS "Temp" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows temperature conditions for the greenhouse.

panels.title: VPD

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, vpd_avg AS "VPD" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows vapor pressure deficit, one of the most important plant-stress metrics.

panels.title: State

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, state AS "State" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows the current controller or equipment state for this subsystem.

panels.title: Cost

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, cost_total AS "Cost" FROM v_cost_today

panels.description: Shows current or recent operating cost for this subsystem.

panels.title: DLI

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, dli_today AS "DLI" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows daily light integral, the accumulated plant light for the day.

panels.title: Alerts

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, open_alerts AS "Alerts" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows current or recent alerts that need attention.

panels.title: Temperature

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), temp_${zone:raw} AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_${zone:raw} IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows temperature conditions for the greenhouse.

panels.title: VPD

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), vpd_${zone:raw} AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vpd_${zone:raw} IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows vapor pressure deficit, one of the most important plant-stress metrics.

panels.title: Humidity

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), rh_${zone:raw} AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND rh_${zone:raw} IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows relative humidity conditions for the greenhouse.

panels.title: DLI

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_lux * 0.0185 * 3600 / 1e6 AS "Reference DLI"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_lux IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Reference DLI from Tempest (lux × 0.0185 × 0.78)

panels.title: Outdoor Temp

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_temp_f AS "Outdoor"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows outdoor reference conditions that influence greenhouse behavior.

panels.title: Controller State

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "value"
FROM system_state
WHERE entity = 'greenhouse_state' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows the current greenhouse controller state.

panels.title: Equipment Health

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, fn_equipment_health() AS "Health Score"

panels.description: Shows the current health score for major greenhouse equipment.

panels.title: Water Today

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), water_total_gal AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND water_total_gal IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows total water used so far today.

panels.title: CO2

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), co2_ppm AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND co2_ppm IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows carbon dioxide conditions in the greenhouse.

panels.title: Outdoor RH

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_rh_pct AS "Outdoor RH"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows outdoor reference conditions that influence greenhouse behavior.

panels.title: Grow Light Hrs

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM SUM(CASE WHEN state THEN next_ts - ts ELSE '0'::interval END)) / 3600.0, 2) AS "Grow Light Hours"
FROM (
  SELECT ts, state, LEAD(ts) OVER (PARTITION BY equipment ORDER BY ts) AS next_ts
  FROM equipment_state
  WHERE equipment IN ('grow_light_main','grow_light_grow') AND ts >= date_trunc('day', now())
) sub

panels.description: Shows grow light state or runtime behavior.

panels.title: PPFD Now

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_lux * 0.0185 AS "Est. PPFD"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_lux IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows current photosynthetic light intensity if available.

panels.title: Transmission

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), transmission_pct AS "Transmission %"
FROM v_light_transmission
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Interior/exterior ratio. Midday clear: 10-17%

panels.title: Outdoor Lux

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_lux AS "Outdoor Lux"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_lux IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows outdoor reference conditions that influence greenhouse behavior.

panels.title: DLI (sensor)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), dli_today AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND dli_today IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: North wall sensor (deprecated)

panels.title: Grow Light

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS "value"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment IN ('grow_light_main','grow_light_grow') AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows grow light state or runtime behavior.

SELECT $__time(ts), temp_south AS "South"

SELECT $__time(ts), temp_east AS "East"

FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_case IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_temp_f AS "Outdoor"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows temperature behavior across the major greenhouse zones.

panels.title: Sun Altitude

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), solar_altitude_deg AS "Altitude"
FROM climate
WHERE solar_altitude_deg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows the current solar altitude angle, useful for interpreting heat and light pressure.

panels.title: Sun Azimuth

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), solar_azimuth_deg AS "Azimuth"
FROM climate
WHERE solar_azimuth_deg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows the current solar azimuth, useful for understanding which faces are taking sun.

panels.title: Sun Direction
panels.description: Compass direction of the sun

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts),
  CASE
    WHEN solar_altitude_deg < 0 THEN 'Below Horizon'
    WHEN solar_azimuth_deg BETWEEN 337.5 AND 360 OR solar_azimuth_deg BETWEEN 0 AND 22.5 THEN 'N'
    WHEN solar_azimuth_deg BETWEEN 22.5 AND 67.5 THEN 'NE'
    WHEN solar_azimuth_deg BETWEEN 67.5 AND 112.5 THEN 'E'
    WHEN solar_azimuth_deg BETWEEN 112.5 AND 157.5 THEN 'SE'
    WHEN solar_azimuth_deg BETWEEN 157.5 AND 202.5 THEN 'S'
    WHEN solar_azimuth_deg BETWEEN 202.5 AND 247.5 THEN 'SW'
    WHEN solar_azimuth_deg BETWEEN 247.5 AND 292.5 THEN 'W'
    WHEN solar_azimuth_deg BETWEEN 292.5 AND 337.5 THEN 'NW'
    ELSE '--'
  END AS "Direction"
FROM climate
WHERE solar_azimuth_deg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: CO₂ (ppm)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), co2_ppm AS "CO₂"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND co2_ppm IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows current greenhouse carbon dioxide concentration.

panels.title: South 1 Moisture

targets.rawSql: SELECT soil_moisture_south_1 AS "Moisture" FROM climate WHERE soil_moisture_south_1 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows soil moisture from the first south-zone probe.

panels.title: South 2 Moisture

targets.rawSql: SELECT soil_moisture_south_2 AS "Moisture" FROM climate WHERE soil_moisture_south_2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows soil moisture from the second south-zone probe.

panels.title: West Moisture

targets.rawSql: SELECT soil_moisture_west AS "Moisture" FROM climate WHERE soil_moisture_west IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows soil moisture from the west-zone probe.

panels.title: South 1 EC

targets.rawSql: SELECT soil_ec_south_1 AS "EC" FROM climate WHERE soil_ec_south_1 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows soil electrical conductivity from the EC-capable south-zone probe.

panels.title: Soil Moisture by Zone

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), soil_moisture_south_1 AS "South 1" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND soil_moisture_south_1 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), soil_moisture_south_2 AS "South 2" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND soil_moisture_south_2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), soil_moisture_west AS "West" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND soil_moisture_west IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows soil moisture readings from the installed root-zone probes.

panels.title: Soil Temperature by Zone

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), soil_temp_south_1 AS "South 1" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND soil_temp_south_1 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), soil_temp_south_2 AS "South 2" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND soil_temp_south_2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), soil_temp_west AS "West" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND soil_temp_west IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows soil temperature readings from the installed root-zone probes.

panels.title: Cooling Cascade — Temperature vs Fan & Mister Activity

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), temp_avg AS "Temperature (°F)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_avg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 85 ELSE NULL END AS "Fan 1 ON" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment = 'fan1' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 83 ELSE NULL END AS "Fan 2 ON" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment = 'fan2' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 81 ELSE NULL END AS "Mister ON" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment IN ('mister_south','mister_west','mister_center') AND state = true AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 79 ELSE NULL END AS "Fog ON" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment = 'fog' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows how rising temperature relates to fan and mister response during active cooling periods.
